chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-938 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 938/2022(C/A) 02-10-2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for applicants/respondents No.7&8. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Naeemullah Mallah, XEN West Division Irrigaton, Khaiprur and Ishrat Bhatti, AXEN Gambat. ***** Statement has been filed by respondent No.4, who is also present and states that Kassi which was allegedly demolished by the petitioner has been restored. Certain pictures have been shown, however this claim is denied by counsel for the applicants/respondents No.7&8 who maintains that the Kassi has not been restored and request for appointment of commissioner is made. We in the circumstances, Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate is appointed as commissioner who to visit the concerned area and affirm the contention that the Kassi has been restored and if so, what is dimension of Kassi as to its width and length and file his report. The fee of commissioner is fixed at Rs.5000/- to be paid to him directly. Statement has been filed by SHO, P.S, Gambat who suggests that the matter pertains to P.S, Khuhra. Let notice be issued to SHO, P.S, Khuhra to apprise this Court of the progress made in FIR No.57 of 2023 of P.S, Khuhra. Adjourned to 24.10.2024. Let copy of this order be provided to AAG’s office for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
